aiBriefing.summary: After reading 50 Gmail threads and 7 Jira tickets with 22 comments: 2 emails are blocked on YOU (TrustSignal invoice approval + Meta badge risk follow-up). 3 Jira finance approvals need action (Millet Mania CN, pricing recovery, Emcure CN). Slack has 10 mentions including Mahima needing a CSM interviewer substitute and Prashant discussing Appbrew. BeYours is sharing Limechat pricing to force a discount — your call on whether to match.
highlights: 🔴 APPROVE: TrustSignal Feb'26 invoice — Nidhi Shah has reconciled and explicitly says 'Vijay can approve for payment'. Direct blocker.
🔴 FOLLOW UP: Meta Business Partner badge at risk (2nd notice) — you looped in Sid & Pushkar yesterday but no reply yet. Probation clock ticking.
🟡 HIRING: Mahima Jain needs an alternate person for CSM Mumbai resume shortlisting (Heli unavailable till Apr 2). No response from you.
🟡 PRICING: BeYours (Nilesh) sharing Limechat rates (₹7.5K/month, marketing @0.87) to pressure a discount. Decide: match or hold firm?
🟡 DOCS GAP: Adit flagged KwikChat Confluence docs missing for 5 recurring support themes. Assign owners.
🟡 FINANCE: 3 Jira tickets need approval — Millet Mania CN (₹3,625), pricing recovery plan, Emcure CN (₹1.65L).
